description: A rocketeer has finished building the 'A simple model rocket' design and weighed each major component. Calibrate the simulation model to match these real-world measurements by applying mass overrides to the Nose Cone (28.5 g), Body Tube (38.0 g), Trapezoidal Fin Set (12.5 g), Parachute (15.0 g), and Inner Tube (5.5 g). Verify the rocket's stability and predicted apogee through a flight simulation. Save the calibrated design to ~/Documents/rockets/calibrated_simple_rocket.ork and write a mass properties report to ~/Documents/exports/mass_properties_report.txt including a table of original vs measured masses, total rocket mass, CG location, stability margin, predicted apogee altitude, and a flight recommendation.
